name: OpenMP Thread Affinity
summary: Align OpenMP threads with Slurm CPU allocations and affinity settings.
description: This skill helps users request CPUs per task, set OpenMP environment variables, inspect thread placement hints, and avoid oversubscription in threaded HPC jobs.

inputs.name: cpus_per_task
inputs.description: Number of CPU cores allocated to one threaded task.

inputs.name: threaded_command
inputs.description: OpenMP or threaded application command to run inside the allocation.

outputs.name: thread_environment_report
outputs.description: Log of Slurm CPU allocation, OpenMP variables, and optional CPU topology.

outputs.name: threaded_job_output
outputs.description: Output from the threaded application using bounded thread settings.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Submit the smoke job with a short wall time and confirm OMP_NUM_THREADS equals SLURM_CPUS_PER_TASK.
